Home / Support CMC

The Gift of Health

Your generosity helps us provide quality care to everyone in our community — regardless of ability to pay.

Access to quality healthcare is slipping out of reach for so many in San Joaquin and Solano counties. When you give to CMC, you ensure that every patient — insured or not — receives the compassionate care they deserve.

Donate Now
Your Impact

CMC Donor Tier Program

Every level of giving makes a meaningful difference. Choose the tier that works for you.

CMC Friend
$500 – $1,000
  • ✓ Annual Report access
  • ✓ Invitations to CMC events
  • ✓ CMC gift of appreciation
CMC Champion
$1,001 – $2,500
  • ✓ All CMC Friend benefits
  • ✓ State of CMC virtual event invitation
  • ✓ Recognition in donor communications
Major Gifts
CMC Partner
$2,501+
  • ✓ All CMC Champion benefits
  • ✓ Optional Annual Report acknowledgment
  • ✓ Website recognition
  • ✓ Exclusive donor recognition event
Choose Your Impact

Beneficiary Program Areas

Direct your gift to the programs and populations that matter most to you.

🎯
CMC The Rock
Programs for teens & young adults
🏠
Care for Unhoused
Families and individuals experiencing homelessness
🚐
CareLink Mobile
Mobile health clinic services
🧓
Aging Adults
Specialized care for older community members
👧
Children & Youth
Pediatric and developmental care
❤️
Uninsured Families
Care regardless of ability to pay
🏥
General Operating
Sustain all CMC programs and services
Flexibility

Payment Options

Online
One-time or installment payments online
Monthly Pledge
Set up recurring monthly giving
By Check
Mail a check to our administration office
Planned Giving
Include CMC in your estate planning
Give Online
Major Gifts & Planned Giving

Partner With Us

Interested in a major gift, legacy giving, or including CMC in your estate plan? Our Development Director would love to connect with you.

Jennie Rodriguez
Development Director
(209) 373-2454 jrmoore@cmcenters.org
Signature Event

Annual Gala: A Black & White Masquerade

Join us each year for our signature fundraising gala. A celebration of community, compassion, and the future of healthcare in the Central Valley.
